subcodes.first_line: O Ja'far! Upon thee be My Glory! O Sign of Life! Upon thee be the Glory of God, the Revealer of Verses! In this hour when the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جعفر علیک بهائی یا ایة الحیاة علیک بهاءالله منزل الایات در این حین که مظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
